member.name: T:TokenRejectFlow
member.summary: Reject undesired token(s) and dissociate in a single flow.

member.name: P:TokenRejectFlow.OwnerId
member.summary: An account holding the tokens to be rejected.

member.name: P:TokenRejectFlow.NftIds
member.summary: A list of one or more token rejections (a single specific serialized non-fungible/unique token).

member.name: P:TokenRejectFlow.NodeAccountIds
member.summary:
Set the account IDs of the nodes that this transaction will be submitted to.

Providing an explicit node account ID interferes with client-side load balancing of the network. By default, the SDK will pre-generate a transaction for 1/3 of the nodes on the network. If a node is down, busy, or otherwise reports a fatal error, the SDK will try again with a different node.

The list of node AccountIds to be set {@code this}

member.name: P:TokenRejectFlow.FreezeWithClient
member.summary: Set the client that this transaction will be frozen with.

member.name: T:TokenRejectFlow_2
member.summary: Set the private key that this transaction will be signed with.

member.name: M:TokenRejectFlow.SignWith(PublicKey,System.Func{System.Byte[],System.Byte[]})
member.summary: Set the public key and key list that this transaction will be signed with.
member.param: the public key
the key list

member.name: M:TokenRejectFlow.SignWithOperator(Client)
member.summary: Set the operator that this transaction will be signed with.
member.param: the client with the transaction to execute

member.name: M:TokenRejectFlow.Execute(Client)
member.summary: Execute the transactions in the flow with the passed in client.
member.param: the client with the transaction to execute

member.name: M:TokenRejectFlow.Execute(Client,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Execute the transactions in the flow with the passed in client.
member.param: the client with the transaction to execute
The timeout after which each transaction's execution attempt will be cancelled.

member.name: M:TokenRejectFlow.ExecuteAsync(Client)
member.summary: Execute the transactions in the flow with the passed in client asynchronously.
member.param: the client with the transaction to execute

member.name: M:TokenRejectFlow.ExecuteAsync(Client,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Execute the transactions in the flow with the passed in client asynchronously.
member.param: the client with the transaction to execute
The timeout after which each transaction's execution attempt will be cancelled.

member.name: M:TokenRejectFlow.ExecuteAsync(Client,System.Action{TransactionResponse,System.Exception})
member.summary: Execute the transactions in the flow with the passed in client asynchronously.
member.param: the client with the transaction to execute
a Action which handles the result or error.

member.name: M:TokenRejectFlow.ExecuteAsync(Client,System.TimeSpan,System.Action{TransactionResponse,System.Exception})
member.summary: Execute the transactions in the flow with the passed in client asynchronously.
member.param: the client with the transaction to execute
The timeout after which each transaction's execution attempt will be cancelled.
a Action which handles the result or error.

member.name: M:TokenRejectFlow.ExecuteAsync(Client,System.Action{TransactionResponse},System.Action{System.Exception})
member.summary: Execute the transactions in the flow with the passed in client asynchronously.
member.param: the client with the transaction to execute
a Action which consumes the result on success.
a Action which consumes the error on failure.

member.name: M:TokenRejectFlow.ExecuteAsync(Client,System.TimeSpan,System.Action{TransactionResponse},System.Action{System.Exception})
member.summary: Execute the transactions in the flow with the passed in client asynchronously.
member.param: the client with the transaction to execute
The timeout after which each transaction's execution attempt will be cancelled.
a Action which consumes the result on success.
a Action which consumes the error on failure.
